title: Terms and Conditions
author: Priya
content:
Welcome to Get2Logics.

Users are expected to use this website responsibly and respectfully. Any misuse of the website or its content is strictly prohibited.

We may update or revise these terms and conditions from time to time. By continuing to use this website, you agree to be bound by the updated terms.
